proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +40.7pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Portfolio is 94% UP_TRI by signal_type and 100% Choppy by regime — when Bear regime returns, Bear-gated UP_TRI promotion will fire into a book already heavily weighted toward UP_TRI signal; monitor signal_type concentration on Bear re-emergence
R-multiple 0.61 reflects ongoing D-8 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7; cohort edge is win-rate driven not R-driven
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +40.7pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +40.7pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6), so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration on 36 open positions is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-25) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +30.8pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Regime distribution shows Choppy dominance over the prior 14 days with only sporadic Bear appearances, so the cohort may remain dormant and unvalidated in live conditions for extended periods
R-multiple 0.98 sits just below Tier S threshold; any drift in win-size distribution could flip tier classification at next archive comparison
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +30.8pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +30.8pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6), so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration trigger on 36 open positions is not compounded; a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 06-25) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (100%), UP_TRI signal (94.4%), UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (22.22%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (100%), UP_TRI signal (94.4%), UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (22.22%); recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI and sector=Bank until Bank cell share falls below 0.20 via natural exit (Day 6) or until Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M. If adding risk, restrict to non-Bank sectors AND consider a short-index or BEAR_PROXY hedge sized to ~15-20% of the long book to offset a Choppy→Bear flip on unvalidated edge.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds all 36 long positions simultaneously with no statistical justification (cohort still Candidate tier), and the Bank-cluster amplifies drawdown if financials lead the rotation lower.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at 1.0 vs 0.80 threshold (36/36 positions)
UP_TRI signal share at 34/36 = 94.4%, above 0.85 threshold; book fully directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 36/36)
UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 8/36 = 22.22%, above 0.20 cell threshold
Secondary cells UP_TRI×Choppy×FMCG at 16.67% and UP_TRI×Choppy×Chem at 13.89% compound the long-Choppy clustering
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort tier = Candidate (n=256) — edge not validated for the dominant exposure
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%), UP_TRI signal (94.4%), UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (22.22%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI and sector=Bank until Bank cell share falls below 0.20 via natural exit (Day 6) or until Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M. If adding risk, restrict to non-Bank sectors AND consider a short-index or BEAR_PROXY hedge sized to ~15-20% of the long book to offset a Choppy→Bear flip on unvalidated edge.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds all 36 long positions simultaneously with no statistical justification (cohort still Candidate tier), and the Bank-cluster amplifies drawdown if financials lead the rotation lower.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 22.22% (8 of 36 positions). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 34/36 = 94.4% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=256) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
